css: .card { text-align: center; padding: 12px 0; } .card-box { background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 18px; margin: 8px 12px; text-align: center; } .box-label { font-size: 11px; color: #999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .word-big { font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a2e; } .ipa { font-size: 17px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px; } .audio-btn { margin-top: 8px; } .box-text { font-size: 16px; color: #333; line-height: 1.7; text-align: left; } .notes { font-size: 14px; color: #aaa; text-align: left; padding: 0 12px; } .notes b { color: #666; }
